name: TCIL_UnassignTransmitter
title: TCIL_UnassignTransmitter
syntax: long TCIL_UnassignTransmitter (dword ddi, dbNode user, dword elementNumberUser, dbNode source, dword elementNumberSource) // form 1
long TCIL_UnassignTransmitter (dword ddi, dword addressUser, dword elementNumberUser, dword addressSource, dword elementNumberSource) // form 2
long TCIL_UnassignTransmitter (dbNode tc, dword ddi, dword addressUser, dword elementNumberUser, dword addressSource, dword elementNumberSource) // form 3
long TCIL_UnassignTransmitter (dbNode tc, dword ddi, dbNode user, dword elementNumberUser, dbNode source, dword elementNumberSource) // form 4
description: The functions sends an Unassign Transmitter message to the setpoint value source device.

parameters.name: ddi
parameters.description: This DDI and the element number specify the setpoint value user.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Peer control capable device which acts as a setpoint value user.

parameters.name: addressUser
parameters.description: Address of the peer control capable device which acts as a setpoint value user.

parameters.name: elementNumberUser
parameters.description: The combination of this element number and the DDI shall stop receiving data from the setpoint value source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Peer control capable device which acts as a setpoint value source.

parameters.name: addressSource
parameters.description: Address of the peer control capable device which acts as a setpoint value source.

parameters.name: elementNumberSource
parameters.description: The value of the process variable specified by combination of this element number and the DDI shall no longer be sent to the setpoint value user.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: Task Controller simulation node to apply the function.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
